page.title: Onboarding
page.subtitle: Convert shortlisted candidates into employees after prerequisite verification

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, ID number, or phone…

empty.admitFirst: Admit a shortlisted candidate to begin the onboarding process

admit.title: Admit Candidates to Onboarding
admit.description: Select one or more interviewed / shortlisted candidates to admit.
admit.noEligible: No eligible candidates — candidates must be interviewed or shortlisted first

checklist.title: Onboarding Checklist
checklist.smpNote: SMP worker — lighter checklist (photo + ID only)
checklist.smpHint: SMP worker — lighter checklist (photo + ID only)
checklist.allComplete: All prerequisites complete — candidate is ready to convert
checklist.readyToConvert: Ready to convert — use the "Convert to Employee" button on the main list
checklist.readyHint: Ready to convert — use the "Convert to Employee" button on the main list
checklist.contractMustBeSigned: Contract must be signed before conversion
checklist.contractFirst: Contract must be signed before conversion
checklist.notesPlaceholder: Add notes about this candidate's onboarding…

rejectConfirm.title: Reject this candidate?
rejectConfirm.description: This will remove the candidate from the onboarding pipeline. You can re-admit them later if needed.

docPreview.title: Document Preview
docPreview.notAvailable: Preview not available for this file type

convert.title: Convert to Employee
convert.verified: All prerequisites verified. Fill in the employment details to complete the conversion.
convert.verifiedHint: All prerequisites verified. Fill in the employment details to complete the conversion.
convert.smpRequired: Required — SMP workers must be linked to a company.

bulkConvert.title: Bulk Convert to Employees
bulkConvert.description_one: Convert {{n}} eligible candidate into an employee at once. Fill in the shared employment details below.
bulkConvert.description_other: Convert {{n}} eligible candidates into employees at once. Fill in the shared employment details below.
bulkConvert.skippedDetail: Contract not yet signed — generate & sign contracts first
bulkConvert.skippedHint: Contract not yet signed — generate & sign contracts first
bulkConvert.smpRequired: Required for SMP candidates in this batch.

bulkContracts.title: Bulk Generate Contracts
bulkContracts.description: Generate employment contracts for all active onboarding candidates. Each candidate will be notified by SMS.
bulkContracts.eligibleDetail: Non-SMP candidates with complete documents will receive contracts
bulkContracts.eligibleHint: Non-SMP candidates with complete documents will receive contracts

rejectDialog.title: Reject this candidate?
rejectDialog.description: This will remove the candidate from the onboarding pipeline. You can re-admit them later if needed.

deleteDoc.title: Delete {{label}}?
deleteDoc.description: This will permanently remove the uploaded file. The candidate will be notified by SMS and will need to re-upload it.

preview.title: Document Preview
preview.notAvailable: Preview not available for this file type

contract.unlockHint: Complete all document requirements above to unlock contract generation
contract.selectTemplate: Select a contract template to generate for this candidate:
contract.noActiveTemplates: No active templates — create one first
contract.candidateContractDescription: Viewing the candidate's generated contract with actual data.

templates.subtitle: Create and manage employment contract templates for auto-generation
templates.emptyHint: Create a template to start generating employment contracts
templates.editorDescription: Define the contract structure with articles. Use {{vars}} for auto-filled candidate data.
templates.name: Template Name *
templates.availableVars: Available variables (click to insert at cursor):
templates.preamblePlaceholder: e.g. This Employment Contract is entered into between {{companyName}} (hereinafter referred to as the "Employer") and {{fullName}} (hereinafter referred to as the "Employee"), holder of ID No. {{nationalId}}…
templates.preambleHint: Introductory section — identifies the parties, recites the background, and sets up the definitions before the numbered articles begin.
templates.articleBody: Article body — use {{vars}} for auto-filled data
templates.subArticleBody: Sub-article body — use {{vars}} for auto-filled data
templates.testimoniumPlaceholder: e.g. IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first written above.
templates.testimoniumHint: Closing clause — the formal attestation that the parties have agreed and signed the contract.
templates.documentFooterPlaceholder: e.g. Luxury Carts Company Ltd | CR No. 4030123456 | P.O. Box 12345, Makkah 21955, Saudi Arabia | Tel: +966 12 345 6789
templates.documentFooterHint: Small print at the bottom of every page — company name, commercial registration, address, contact details.
templates.previewDescription: This shows how the contract will look with sample data filled in.

toasts.contractGenerated: Contract generated and ready for signing
toasts.clickInsideFirst: Click inside the preamble or an article body first
toasts.docRemovedDesc: Candidate will see the missing document on next login.
